questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Basilica of Sacré Coeur, a famous Roman Catholic church and minor basilica, located in Paris, France. It is known for its distinctive white stone architecture and its position atop the butte Montmartre, the highest point in Paris. The basilica is one of the most recognizable landmarks in the city.
